      Salesforce Architect

      • Remote
        • Warsaw, Mazowieckie, Poland
      • PLN 10,080 - PLN 33,600 per month

      Job description

      Join our team as a Salesforce Architect and lead the design of scalable, innovative Salesforce solutions for international clients. Work remotely from Poland with B2B contract flexibility.

      Job requirements

      Responsibilities

      • Design and implement scalable Salesforce architectures aligned with business requirements.

      • Lead the technical strategy, integrations, and customization of Salesforce platforms.

      • Collaborate with stakeholders to translate business needs into technical solutions.

      • Oversee and guide developers and consultants in implementing Salesforce solutions.

      • Ensure system scalability, performance, and adherence to best practices.

      • Stay up to date with Salesforce innovations and assess their potential for integration.

      Must-Have Requirements

      Hard Skills:

      • Proven experience as a Salesforce Architect or in a similar role.

      • Deep knowledge of Salesforce platform (Sales Cloud, Service Cloud, Marketing Cloud).

      • Expertise in Apex, Visualforce, LWC, and Salesforce APIs (REST/SOAP).

      • Strong experience with system integrations and middleware solutions.

      • Salesforce certifications (e.g., Application Architect, System Architect) are a must.

      Soft Skills:

      • Excellent analytical and problem-solving abilities.

      • Strong communication skills to interact with both technical and non-technical stakeholders.

      • Leadership capabilities and experience in guiding technical teams.

      • Process-oriented with a focus on delivering high-quality solutions.

      Availability

      • Must be available for a 4-hour overlap between 15:00 and 19:00 Poland time to ensure real-time collaboration.

      Remote
      • Warsaw, Mazowieckie, Poland
      PLN 10,080 - PLN 33,600 per month

      or
